note: Describes the structure of a selected_plan.json produced per run.

device.description: Selected device identifier. 'pooled' when multi-device pooling is active.

pooling_modes.by-instance: Default. Each (algo, device, shots, instance) is one unit.
pooling_modes.pooled-by-depth: Groups all instances sharing the same (shots, depth) into a pool. pool_membership.csv is written for audit.
pooling_modes.multi-device: Aggregates points across devices for the same (algo, shots). device relabelled 'pooled'. pool_membership.csv written. Only valid when devices are comparable.

independence_assertions: No derived proxy from the same state distribution may be used as an independent predictor of Σ.
source_map entries must reference distinct raw files.
